articles.author: Nicholas Vinocur
articles.title: EU’s Kallas rejects Gerhard Schröder as Russia-Ukraine negotiator - politico.eu
articles.description: Russian leader Vladimir Putin has said he would like the ex-German chancellor to negotiate on Europe’s behalf.
articles.content: “And second, I think Gerhard Schröder has been the high-level lobbyist for Russian state-owned companies so its clear why Putin wants him to be the person, so he would be sitting on both sides of the… [+1028 chars]
